name: mock-gpio
documentation:
# GPIOEmulator

The easiest way to use this package is to install using pip3 for python 3

```bash
$ sudo pip3 install Mock.GPIO
```

To use the emulator just type the following at the beginning of your script.

```python
from Mock.GPIO import GPIO
```

## Works with

- [python 3.6.8](https://www.python.org/downloads/release/3.6.8)

## Simulation

This library simulates the following functions which are used in the RPi.GPIO library.

- GPIO.setmode()
- GPIO.getmode()
- GPIO.setwarnings()
- GPIO.setup()
- GPIO.output()
- GPIO.input()
- GPIO.wait_for_edge()
- GPIO.add_event_detect()
- GPIO.event_detected()
- GPIO.add_event_callback()
- GPIO.remove_event_detect()
- GPIO.gpio_function()
- GPIO.start()
- GPIO.ChangeFrequency()
- GPIO.ChangeDutyCycle()
- GPIO.stop()
- GPIO.cleanup()

modules.name: Mock.GPIO
documentation: Mock Library for RPi.GPIO

functions.name: Mock.GPIO.setmode
documentation:
Set up numbering mode to use for channels.
BOARD - Use Raspberry Pi board numbers
BCM   - Use Broadcom GPIO 00..nn numbers
GPIO LIBRARY Functions

functions.name: Mock.GPIO.getmode
documentation:
Get numbering mode used for channel numbers.
Returns BOARD, BCM or None

functions.name: Mock.GPIO.setwarnings
documentation: Enable or disable warning messages

functions.name: Mock.GPIO.setup
documentation:
Set up a GPIO channel or list of channels with a direction and (optional) pull up/down control
channels        - either board pin number or BCM number depending on which mode is set.
direction      - IN or OUT
[pull_up_down] - PUD_OFF (default), PUD_UP or PUD_DOWN
[initial]      - Initial value for an output channel

functions.name: Mock.GPIO.output
documentation:
Output to a GPIO channel or list of channels
channels - either board pin number or BCM number depending on which mode is set.
values   - 0/1 or False/True or LOW/HIGH

functions.name: Mock.GPIO.input
documentation:
Input from a GPIO channel.  Returns HIGH=1=True or LOW=0=False
channel - either board pin number or BCM number depending on which mode is set.

functions.name: Mock.GPIO.wait_for_edge
documentation:
Wait for an edge.  Returns the channel number or None on timeout.
channel      - either board pin number or BCM number depending on which mode is set.
edge         - RISING, FALLING or BOTH
[bouncetime] - time allowed between calls to allow for switchbounce
[timeout]    - timeout in ms

functions.name: Mock.GPIO.add_event_detect
documentation:
Enable edge detection events for a particular GPIO channel.
channel      - either board pin number or BCM number depending on which mode is set.
edge         - RISING, FALLING or BOTH
[callback]   - A callback function for the event (optional)
[bouncetime] - Switch bounce timeout in ms for callback

functions.name: Mock.GPIO.event_detected
documentation:
Returns True if an edge has occurred on a given GPIO.  You need to enable edge detection using add_event_detect() first.
channel - either board pin number or BCM number depending on which mode is set.

functions.name: Mock.GPIO.add_event_callback
documentation:
Add a callback for an event already defined using add_event_detect()
channel      - either board pin number or BCM number depending on which mode is set.
callback     - a callback function

functions.name: Mock.GPIO.remove_event_detect
documentation:
Remove edge detection for a particular GPIO channel
channel - either board pin number or BCM number depending on which mode is set.

functions.name: Mock.GPIO.gpio_function
documentation:
Return the current GPIO function (IN, OUT, PWM, SERIAL, I2C, SPI)
channel - either board pin number or BCM number depending on which mode is set.

functions.name: Mock.GPIO.cleanup
documentation:
Clean up by resetting all GPIO channels that have been used by this program to INPUT with no pullup/pulldown and no event detection
[channels] - individual channel or list/tuple of channels to clean up.  Default - clean every channel that has been used.

methods.name: Mock.GPIO.PWM.__init__
documentation: x.__init__(...) initializes x; see help(type(x)) for signature
initialise PWM channel

methods.name: Mock.GPIO.PWM.start
documentation:
Start software PWM
dutycycle - the duty cycle (0.0 to 100.0)
where dc is the duty cycle (0.0 <= dc <= 100.0)

methods.name: Mock.GPIO.PWM.ChangeFrequency
documentation:
Change the frequency
frequency - frequency in Hz (freq > 1.0)
where freq is the new frequency in Hz

methods.name: Mock.GPIO.PWM.ChangeDutyCycle
documentation:
Change the duty cycle
dutycycle - between 0.0 and 100.0

methods.name: Mock.GPIO.PWM.stop
documentation: stop PWM generation
